title: Common
description: Shared definitions. All coordinates are integer millimetres (mm).

Vec2.title: Vec2
Vec2.description: A 2D point in integer millimetres: [x, y].

Vec3.title: Vec3
Vec3.description: A 3D point in integer millimetres: [x, y, z].

Ring.title: Ring
Ring.description: A closed ring of points (closure implicit). Outer ring CCW, holes CW.

Polygon.title: Polygon
Polygon.description: A polygon: rings[0] is the outer boundary, rings[1..] are holes.

Units.title: Units
Units.description: Display units only. Storage is always integer mm.

RoomType.title: RoomType
RoomType.description: Extensible room/space type. Known values live in KNOWN_ROOM_TYPES; any non-empty string is allowed so jurisdictions/firms can extend the registry.
RoomType.$comment: Known: bedroom, master_bedroom, bathroom, ensuite, kitchen, living, dining, hallway, entry, stair, elevator, closet, laundry, garage, office, balcony, storage, mechanical, corridor, lobby, retail, meeting, reception, wc, utility.
